mapper.select: SELECT id, title, description, order_index, visibility FROM sections ORDER BY order_index ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sections(title, description, order_index, visibility) VALUES(#{title}, #{description}, #{orderIndex}, #{visibility})
mapper.update: UPDATE sections SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, order_index = #{orderIndex}, visibility = #{visibility} WHERE id = #{id}
